# growthbook_segment (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook segment by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique segment identifier (e.g. `seg_...`).

### Read-Only

- `datasource_id` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `description` (String) Segment description.
- `fact_table_id` (String) Fact table ID for `FACT` segments.
- `filters` (List of String) Fact table filter IDs.
- `identifier_type` (String) Identifier type.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the segment is managed from.
- `name` (String) Segment name.
- `owner` (String) Segment owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs that can access this segment.
- `query` (String) SQL query defining the segment.
- `type` (String) Segment type (`SQL` or `FACT`).
